players_meta: View your BTD6 profile with an OAK or look up a previously indexed player.
players_oak_help: Use your Open Access Key to open your own public profile.
players_oak_privacy: Your OAK is used once on the server, then discarded. Only your public Ninja Kiwi user ID is retained.
players_index_limit: Nickname search covers only players chimps.gg has already encountered. It is not a global BTD6 directory.
players_no_index_match: No indexed nickname matches. Use their Ninja Kiwi profile URL or user ID below.
players_id_fallback: Use a profile URL or user ID
players_profile_identifier: Ninja Kiwi profile URL or user ID
community_maps_meta: Open a BTD6 community map by share code and inspect decisive win rate and tracked version trends.
community_maps_help: Enter the share code shown in BTD6 to load its current results.
community_maps_tracking_notice: A map starts accumulating daily version history after its first lookup on chimps.gg.
community_maps_decisive_explain: Wins ÷ (wins + losses). Plays are shown separately because they include restarts and abandoned attempts.
community_maps_waiting_snapshot: The first daily snapshot has not been collected yet.
community_maps_transition_excluded: activity crossed the version boundary and is excluded from precise totals
footer_disclaimer: Project not affiliated with or endorsed by Ninja Kiwi. Bloons TD 6 and its assets belong to their respective owners.
home_meta_description: Choose a Bloons TD 6 map and open a verified, versioned strategy guide for your next run.
home_og_description: Choose your map and get straight to a verified strategy.
maps_meta_description: Choose a BTD6 map and find versioned, verified CHIMPS strategy guides.
maps_lead: Start with the map in front of you. We’ll show every verified strategy currently ready for it.
first_guides_pending: The first guides are being prepared in Studio.
strategies_meta_description: Filter ready Bloons TD 6 strategy guides by map, mode, hero, execution difficulty, map difficulty, and verified version.
strategies_og_description: Find a versioned, community-curated strategy for your next run.
strategies_lead: Search the ready library, then narrow it by map, mode, hero, or game version.
empty_results_title: No ready strategy matches that setup
empty_results_message: Try removing one filter or browse everything that has been verified for public use.
detail_og_description: Visual placements and build order verified on BTD6 {version}.
no_layout_notice: This guide does not have a visual layout yet.
build_order_pending: The build order is still being documented.
heroes_meta_description: Explore BTD6 heroes and the ready chimps.gg strategies, maps, modes, and verified versions associated with each one.
heroes_og_description: Browse heroes through real, curated strategy coverage.
heroes_lead: Explore each hero through the maps, modes, and verified strategies they already cover.
hero_meta_description: Explore {name} strategies, maps, modes, and verified game versions curated on chimps.gg.
hero_og_description: {guides} ready for {name} with factual coverage data.
hero_default_description: {name} is ready to lead your next Bloons TD 6 strategy.
hero_strategies_lead: Curated build orders that explicitly use {name}.
empty_hero_message: A {name} strategy has not been marked ready for public use yet.
error_404_message: The guide or page you requested is not available.
error_500_message: Content is temporarily unavailable. Try the page again in a moment.
